name: dependency-manger
description: Task Dependency Manager - Full-stack web application

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.clean: rd /s /q node_modules server\node_modules client\node_modules 2>nul || echo Cleaned
scripts.test: concurrently "cd server && npm test" "cd client && npm test"
